prompt: {"high_level_description":"A nearly dark meditation chamber where an instrument deck has dissolved to almost nothing: one breathing green coherence trace floats low center as the only light, faint ember outlines of powered-down instruments at the edges.","style_description":{"aesthetics":"near-dark meditation chamber, an interface reduced to breath, serene and vast, deeply calm, warm darkness","lighting":"almost no light, a single soft green luminous trace low in the frame as the only illumination, its glow falling off quickly into warm black, faint warm ember edges on distant dark shapes, no blue cast anywhere","photo":"eye-level seated point of view in darkness, 35mm lens, f/2.0, shallow focus on the luminous trace, long soft falloff into black","medium":"photograph","color_palette":["#090604","#110C08","#93B99A","#767169","#EAA950"]},"compositional_deconstruction":{"background":"A dark room at the end of a long session, deep warm blackness with no visible architecture, the sense of a wide bench present only as absence, everything powered down and at rest.","elements":[{"type":"obj","bbox":[590,200,730,800],"desc":"A slim horizontal band of light floating low center: a physiological coherence waveform frozen mid-breath, rendered in quiet sage green with a soft gentle bloom, slow sine-like undulation, the only live instrument remaining, now the control surface itself.","color_palette":["#93B99A"]},{"type":"obj","bbox":[100,0,500,250],"desc":"Faint matte silhouettes of powered-down instruments at the left frame edge, barely visible as warm ember outlines, dissolved and asleep.","color_palette":["#362F28","#EAA950"]},{"type":"obj","bbox":[100,750,500,1000],"desc":"Faint matte silhouettes of powered-down instrument shapes at the right frame edge, warm ember outlines fading into the dark.","color_palette":["#362F28","#EAA950"]}]}}
